name: Base Vault Door
description: A standard door from the Kerplunk-a-tron Windmill Base, crafted by welding together multiple layers of metal. Its vault-door-inspired design combines aesthetic appeal with a practical anti-destruction function. Such a door can effectively resist damage from tools such as drills, prying bars, and hammers, reflecting its original purpose of guarding against all unwelcome intrusions. Of course, this may seem somewhat excessive for a place like The Realm Within, where the greatest threat is likely the occasional small animal using it as a scratching post.
